---
title: "Ann Brennan"
about:
  template: trestles  # jolla  trestles  solana  marquee  broadside
  image: ann-picture.jpg
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: rounded # rectangle  round  rounded
  
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ann-brennan-4138b928b/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/annbrennan/annbrennan.github.io
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resumé
      href: https://annbrennan.github.io/resume-2025.pdf
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:ab105@geneseo.edu

---


Ann Brennan is pursuing a major in Data Analytics and minor in Mathematics at SUNY Geneseo. Ann also competes for the SUNY Geneseo cross country and track and field teams.

## Education

State University of New York at Geneseo | Geneseo, NY <br>
B.S. in Data Analytics | Aug 2022 - May 2026 <br>
Minor in Mathematics 

## Experience

Gallagher | Financial & Actuarial Consulting Intern <br> 
June 2024 - August 2024, June 2025 - August 2025
